site.name: ToolBoxy

toolDescriptions.json-validator: Validate JSON syntax instantly. Paste your JSON and get clear error messages with line numbers.

toolDescriptions.css-minifier: Minify CSS by removing comments and whitespace. See the exact percentage saved and download the result.

toolDescriptions.unit-converter: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, and data instantly.

toolDescriptions.image-compress: Compress and resize images in your browser to reduce file size without losing quality.
toolDescriptions.jpg-to-png: Convert JPG and JPEG images to lossless PNG format directly in your browser.
toolDescriptions.png-to-jpg: Convert PNG images to JPG with adjustable quality. Transparent areas filled white.
toolDescriptions.svg-to-png: Render SVG files to PNG at any scale. Paste SVG code or upload a file.
toolDescriptions.checksum-generator: Compute SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 checksums for files or text. Verify file integrity.

toolDescriptions.html-entity-encoder: Encode special characters as HTML entities or decode HTML entities back to text.
toolDescriptions.number-base-converter: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal instantly.
toolDescriptions.unix-timestamp: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Includes a live clock.
toolDescriptions.word-frequency: Analyze word frequency in any text. See counts, percentages, and rankings.
toolDescriptions.url-parser: Parse any URL into components: protocol, host, path, query parameters, and hash.

toolDescriptions.text-reverser: Reverse text by characters, words, or lines. Simple and fast text manipulation tool.
toolDescriptions.color-gradient-generator: Generate CSS gradients with custom colors, direction, and type. Includes preset themes.
toolDescriptions.roman-numeral-converter: Convert between numbers and Roman numerals. Supports values from 1 to 3999.
toolDescriptions.lorem-ipsum-generator: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words.

toolDescriptions.string-length-counter: Count characters, words, bytes, lines, and sentences in any text. Click any stat to copy.
toolDescriptions.temperature-converter: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, and Rankine temperature units.
toolDescriptions.morse-code-converter: Convert text to Morse code and Morse code back to text. Includes quick reference chart.
toolDescriptions.countdown-timer: Simple countdown timer with presets. Pause, resume, and reset with a visual progress bar.
toolDescriptions.character-counter: Count characters, words, bytes, lines, sentences and more. Includes reading time estimate.
toolDescriptions.color-mixer: Mix multiple colors by weight. Shows the blended result in HEX, RGB, and HSL.
toolDescriptions.text-to-slug: Convert any text into a URL-friendly slug with custom separator and case options.
toolDescriptions.csv-viewer: View and search CSV files in a table. Drag & drop files or paste CSV text directly.

toolDescriptions.image-base64-converter: Convert images to Base64 strings and decode Base64 back to viewable images.
toolDescriptions.markdown-preview: Live side-by-side Markdown editor with rendered preview. Supports headings, links, code blocks.
toolDescriptions.yaml-validator: Validate YAML syntax and display a JSON representation of top-level keys.
toolDescriptions.line-sort: Sort, deduplicate, reverse, or shuffle lines of text. Supports case-insensitive and trim options.
toolDescriptions.number-sequence-generator: Generate number sequences with custom start, end, step, separator, prefix, and suffix.
toolDescriptions.word-wrap: Wrap long text at a specified column width using word, character, or break mode.
toolDescriptions.text-statistics: Detailed text analysis: characters, words, sentences, reading ease score, and character frequency.
toolDescriptions.color-scheme-generator: Generate harmonious color palettes using analogous, complementary, triadic, and more schemes.
toolDescriptions.html-to-markdown: Convert HTML to Markdown automatically. Handles headings, links, lists, code, and formatting.
toolDescriptions.text-padder: Pad text lines to a fixed width with left, right, or center alignment using any character.
toolDescriptions.json-schema-validator: Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema. Checks types, required fields, enums, and ranges.
toolDescriptions.css-gradient-generator: Create linear, radial, and conic CSS gradients with multi-stop color controls.
toolDescriptions.xml-formatter: Format or minify XML with configurable indentation. Instantly readable output with download support.
toolDescriptions.epoch-converter: Convert Unix epoch timestamps to readable dates and vice versa. Supports seconds, milliseconds, and multiple timezones.
toolDescriptions.text-repeater: Repeat any text a specified number of times with custom separators like newline, space, or comma.
toolDescriptions.column-extractor: Extract specific columns from CSV or delimited text. Click columns to toggle selection, choose custom separators.
toolDescriptions.bracket-matcher: Validate bracket matching in code. Highlights matched pairs by depth and pinpoints mismatched or unclosed brackets.
toolDescriptions.reading-level-analyzer: Analyze text readability using the Flesch Reading Ease and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level formulas.
toolDescriptions.ini-parser: Parse INI configuration files into structured tables or JSON. Handles sections, keys, and comments.
toolDescriptions.slug-to-title: Convert URL slugs or kebab-case text into Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, and more.
toolDescriptions.number-to-words: Convert numbers to English words: cardinal (one, two) and ordinal (first, second) forms.
toolDescriptions.camel-case-converter: Convert between all common naming conventions: camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, kebab-case, and more.
toolDescriptions.html-entity-converter: Encode or decode HTML entities. Supports named entities, numeric, full non-ASCII encoding, and decoding.
toolDescriptions.whitespace-remover: Remove or normalize whitespace from text. Trim lines, collapse spaces, remove blank lines, and more.
toolDescriptions.list-deduplicator: Remove duplicate items from a list. Case-insensitive option, blank line removal, and sort support.
toolDescriptions.text-truncator: Truncate text to a set number of characters, words, or sentences, from the end, start, or middle.
toolDescriptions.ip-address-info: Get detailed info about any IPv4 address: class, type, binary, hex, and subnet calculations with CIDR.
toolDescriptions.cron-expression-builder: Build and validate cron expressions visually. See human-readable descriptions and preview the next scheduled runs.
toolDescriptions.text-line-numberer: Add line numbers to text with configurable start, step, separator, zero-padding, and empty-line handling.
toolDescriptions.css-unit-converter: Convert between CSS units: px, rem, em, pt, vw, vh. Configurable base font size and viewport dimensions.
toolDescriptions.text-diff-inline: Compare two texts and highlight inline differences by word or character, with addition and deletion counts.
toolDescriptions.color-palette-extractor: Upload any image and extract its dominant color palette using k-means clustering. Click to copy hex codes.
toolDescriptions.json-to-typescript: Generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON automatically. Supports nested objects, arrays, and optional fields.
toolDescriptions.mime-type-checker: Look up MIME types by file extension or type string. Covers images, video, audio, documents, fonts, and more.
toolDescriptions.text-encryptor: Apply classical ciphers to text: ROT13, Caesar (any shift), Atbash, and VigenГЁre with a custom key.
toolDescriptions.svg-viewer: Preview SVG files with configurable backgrounds. Minify SVG to remove comments and whitespace, with download.
toolDescriptions.json-path-tester: Test JSONPath expressions against JSON data. Supports dot notation, array slicing, wildcards, and recursive descent.
toolDescriptions.table-generator: Create tables in Markdown, HTML, CSV, or TSV format with custom alignment. Add/remove rows and columns interactively.
toolDescriptions.date-calculator: Calculate the difference between two dates, add or subtract durations, and compute age from a birth date.
toolDescriptions.hex-dump-viewer: View hex dump of any text or hex input. Shows offset, hex bytes, and ASCII representation in classic dump format.
toolDescriptions.text-sort-by-length: Sort lines of text by character or word count, alphabetically, descending, or randomly. Optionally show lengths.
toolDescriptions.pixel-ruler: On-screen ruler for measuring distances in pixels, centimeters, or inches. Auto-detects screen DPI.
toolDescriptions.curl-builder: Build cURL commands visually. Set method, URL, query params, headers, body, and flags, then copy the generated command.
toolDescriptions.chmod-calculator: Calculate Unix file permissions using checkboxes. Shows octal, symbolic, and chmod command output.
toolDescriptions.git-cheat-sheet: Quick reference for essential Git commands, organized by category with search and click-to-copy support.
toolDescriptions.json-beautifier: Beautify and format JSON with configurable indentation and syntax highlighting. Download formatted output.
toolDescriptions.regex-library: Curated library of useful regex patterns for email, URL, IP, date, numbers, and more. Test against your input.
toolDescriptions.css-flexbox-playground: Visually experiment with CSS Flexbox properties. Adjust direction, wrap, justify, align, and gap in real-time and copy the generated CSS.
toolDescriptions.base64-url-encoder: Encode and decode text using Base64 (standard or URL-safe) and URL encoding. Supports UTF-8 and emoji characters.
toolDescriptions.number-converter: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal. Shows bit count, byte size, and formatted output.
toolDescriptions.text-rotate: Transform text with fun effects: flip upside down, mirror, reverse words or lines, rotate characters, or add Zalgo distortion.
toolDescriptions.speech-to-text: Convert spoken words to text using your browser's speech recognition API. Supports multiple languages with interim results.
toolDescriptions.css-animation-generator: Build CSS animations visually. Choose from 8 presets, configure duration, easing, iteration, and direction, then copy the generated keyframes and CSS.
toolDescriptions.markdown-table-generator: Create tables interactively and export as Markdown, HTML, or CSV. Set column alignment, add or remove rows and columns, and download the result.
toolDescriptions.uuid-bulk-generator: Generate up to 1000 UUIDs at once. Supports v4, no-hyphens, uppercase, nil, and short ID formats. Copy all or download as a text file.
toolDescriptions.color-blindness-simulator: Upload an image and preview it as seen by people with protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia, achromatopsia, and other color vision deficiencies.
toolDescriptions.font-pairing-tool: Explore curated Google Font pairings for headings and body text. Preview with live rendering, adjust size, and copy the CSS import snippet.
toolDescriptions.text-counter-advanced: Count characters, words, sentences, paragraphs, syllables, and reading/speaking time. Shows top word frequency and average word/sentence length.
toolDescriptions.ascii-art-generator: Convert text into block ASCII art using a pixel bitmap font. Choose fill character and scale. Supports A-Z, 0-9, and basic punctuation.
toolDescriptions.html-color-picker: Pick colors with a visual picker, view HEX/RGB/HSL/HSV values, check contrast ratios, and browse 60+ named HTML/CSS colors.
toolDescriptions.keyboard-shortcut-tester: Click the capture zone and press any key or shortcut to see the key name, code, and modifiers (Ctrl, Alt, Shift, Meta). Captures last 20 events.
toolDescriptions.css-box-model-visualizer: Visualize and configure CSS box model (margin, border, padding, content). Supports content-box and border-box. Copy the generated CSS.
toolDescriptions.open-graph-preview: Preview how your page looks on Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn when shared. Generate the Open Graph and Twitter meta tags.
toolDescriptions.json-to-yaml: Convert JSON to YAML format. Handles nested objects, arrays, strings with special characters, and boolean/null values correctly.
toolDescriptions.morse-code-translator: Translate text to Morse code and back. Includes audio playback of the Morse signal and a visual reference chart.
toolDescriptions.html-previewer: Live HTML editor with real-time preview. Write HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and see the result instantly in a sandboxed iframe.
toolDescriptions.html-minifier: Minify HTML by removing comments, collapsing whitespace, and optionally minifying inline CSS and JavaScript. Shows bytes saved.
toolDescriptions.pomodoro-timer: A focused Pomodoro timer with configurable work, short break, and long break intervals. Tracks session count with visual progress ring.
toolDescriptions.stopwatch-timer: Precision stopwatch with lap recording. Shows split times and total elapsed time per lap, highlights best and worst laps.
toolDescriptions.typing-speed-test: Measure your typing speed in WPM and accuracy. Choose from 5 sample texts. Highlights correct and incorrect characters in real time.
toolDescriptions.random-quote-generator: Browse 20+ curated quotes across categories like Motivation, Wisdom, and Life. Save favorites, copy, and filter by category.
toolDescriptions.habit-tracker: Track daily habits with a 7-day grid. Add custom habits with emojis, check off completions, and see your current streak.
toolDescriptions.bmi-calculator: Calculate Body Mass Index (BMI) in metric or imperial units. Shows BMI category, color-coded gauge, and healthy weight range.
toolDescriptions.tip-calculator: Calculate restaurant tips with preset percentages or a custom rate. Split the bill among multiple people and copy the summary.
toolDescriptions.age-calculator: Calculate exact age in years, months, and days. Shows total days, weeks, months, and hours lived, plus days until next birthday.
toolDescriptions.loan-calculator: Calculate monthly mortgage or loan payments. Shows total interest, principal vs interest breakdown, and a 12-month amortization preview.
toolDescriptions.currency-converter: Convert between 40+ currencies using approximate exchange rates. Quick compare panel and swap button included.
toolDescriptions.color-contrast-checker: Check WCAG 2.1 color contrast ratios for text and UI accessibility compliance.
toolDescriptions.markdown-to-html: Convert Markdown to clean, semantic HTML with live preview.
toolDescriptions.json-to-xml: Convert JSON data to well-formed XML with customizable root element.
toolDescriptions.text-to-binary: Convert text to Binary, Hexadecimal, Octal, or Decimal вЂ” and back.
toolDescriptions.prime-number-checker: Check if a number is prime, find the Nth prime, or list primes in a range.
